itinerary.route: Dempster Highway TH to Grizzly Lake
itinerary.mapNote: First tundra views open up immediately. Grizzly Lake sits below the Ogilvie ridgeline. 1420m.

itinerary.route: Grizzly Lake to Divide Lake via Grizzly Col
itinerary.mapNote: Grizzly Col at 1650m — the route's high point. Divide Lake below is the classic Tombstone image. 1650m.
Off-trail descent to Talus Lake beneath Tombstone Mountain's jagged face. 1540m.

itinerary.route: Talus Lake to Goldensides Loop and return to TH
itinerary.overnight: Return to Dawson City or Whitehorse
itinerary.mapNote: Goldensides viewpoint — full Tombstone panorama. Autumn tundra colour at its peak in late August. 1580m.

waypoints.name: Tombstone Mountain
waypoints.note: The jagged summit that defines the park — not a trekking summit but always visible.

waypoints.name: Grizzly Col
waypoints.note: High point of the backpacking circuit. Sweeping tundra panoramas in all directions.

waypoints.name: Divide Lake
waypoints.note: The most photographed spot in Tombstone — turquoise lake below jagged peaks.

waypoints.name: Talus Lake
waypoints.note: Remote high lake beneath boulder fields and the north face of the Ogilvie Mountains.

waypoints.name: Goldensides
waypoints.note: Named for autumn tundra colour — a viewpoint above the Dempster Highway with full park panorama.
